title: Add sv.verbatim.source and sv.verbatim.module ops for inline black box extmodules
body:
A second attempt of https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/9131/. Changes from the first PR were made in order to support parametrized black boxes. Because parameters can affect the port interface of a module, we need two ops:

1. `sv.verbatim.source` to represent the shared verbatim definition of a module
2. `sv.verbatim.module` to represent a particular parametrization of that module that can be instantiated

The pipeline is largely the same:

- `BlackBoxInlineAnno` and `BlackBoxPathAnno` are converted to `VerbatimBlackBoxAnno` by BlackBoxReader for consumption by LowerToHW.
- LowerToHW will lower `firrtl.extmodule`s with a `VerbatimBlackBoxAnno` to a `sv.verbatim.source` (only one per file) and a `sv.verbatim.module`.
